headline: Let's work together
subheadline: Have a project in mind, a question, or just want to say hello? Send me a message and I'll get back to you as soon as I can.

success.title: Message sent!
success.body: Thanks for reaching out. I'll be in touch soon.

error.title: Something went wrong
error.body: The message couldn't be sent. Please try again or use a direct link below.

validation.email_invalid: Please enter a valid email address
